corpus.name: W3GoAudit all security template bug corpus
corpus.description: All-bug corpus for templates/security. Labels cover every security template category; parser-only fixtures are intentionally included for W3GoAudit coverage even when market tools cannot compile them.

cases.title: Arbitrary transferFrom direct and internal-flow fixtures
Minimal direct and internal-helper reentrancy fixture
Parser fixture covering Slither-inspired detector patterns

SafeDeposit2.depositFrom(address,uint256) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#156-160) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: token.transferFrom(from,address(this),amount) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#158)

VulnerableNoAuth.withdrawFrom(address,address,uint256) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#117-119) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: token.transferFrom(from,to,amount) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#118)
SafeRoleBasedDeposit.isOperator (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#296) is never initialized. It is used in:

VulnerableBatchDeposit.batchDeposit(address[],uint256[]) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#59-67) has external calls inside a loop: token.transferFrom(from[i],address(this),amounts[i]) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#64)

SafeBatchDeposit.batchDeposit(address[],uint256[]) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#200-209) has external calls inside a loop: token.transferFrom(from[i],address(this),amounts[i]) (test-data/security/test-arbitrary-transferfrom.sol#206)
